response.justification: The candidate has roughly 14-16 years of solid full-stack software development experience but the resume shows no AI/ML platform building, no cloud architecture leadership, and no evidence of the principal/director-level strategic influence the role demands. Recent exposure to AI-agent tooling is brief and tactical rather than the recognized AI expertise or built AI products this position requires.
strengths: Long tenure as a hands-on full-stack engineer across many stacks
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Track record of community contributions, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built at scale
No cloud-architecture or strategic advisory experience at principal/director level
No evidence of influencing strategic customers or large engineering orgs

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering experience and recent AI tooling exposure
